title: French Baked Salmon with Pilaf
description: A French-inspired dish featuring seared salmon fillet baked with herbs and served with a flavorful pilaf. Perfect for a romantic dinner or special occasion.
instructions: Season the salmon fillet with salt and pepper.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, garlic, thyme, and lemon juice.
Place the salmon fillet on a baking sheet and brush the herb mixture on top.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
While the salmon is baking, prepare the pilaf according to package instructions or recipe.
To serve, place the baked salmon on a plate with a scoop of pilaf and enjoy!
Optional: garnish with fresh herbs or lemon wedges.
